title: Abarhuli baseYurophu Bafumana iSewula Afrika
subject: History
caps_topic: Explorers from Europe find southern Africa

sources.title: Bartolomeu Dias reaches present Mossel Bay
Portuguese navigator Bartholomew Dias erects the first stone cross on the South African coast
Explorer and navigator Vasco da Gama completes his voyage round the Cape of Good Hope to India
Van Riebeeck lands at the Cape
Jan van Riebeeck, Dutch colonial administrator and first commander of the colony at the Cape of Good Hope, is born

slides.title: Abarhuli baseYurophu Bafumana iSewula Afrika
slides.lead: Indlela abatjhayeli bomkhumbi bePortugal namaDatjhi (amaHolori) abafika ngayo esiqongolweni se-Afrika, nokobana amakhambo wabo amade atjho ini ebantwini abavele bahlala lapha.

media.alt: Umkhumbi wamapulanga otjhayela phezu kwamagagasi alwandle aluhlaza eduze kwelijobho eliluhlaza le-Sewula Afrika, ngaphasi kwelanga elikhanyako.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='320' height='62' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M0 118 q40 -10 80 0 t80 0 t80 0 t80 0 v62 H0 Z' fill='#2f5a78'/><circle cx='262' cy='42' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M40 118 L64 108 h96 l24 10 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='108' y='58' width='4' height='60' fill='#5c3f26'/><path d='M112 60 q40 8 0 46 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M112 60 q-38 8 0 46 Z' fill='#dcd3c2'/></svg>

slides.notes: Vula ngokubuza abafundi ukuthi 'umrhuli' uyini nokobana kubayini abantu bakade batjhayela emalwandle ebebangawazi. Beka imibono emikhulu emibili yesifundo: (1) abatjhayeli bomkhumbi bePortugal bese amaDatjhi (iHolori) bafumana indlela yelwandle ejikeleza iSewula Afrika, begodu (2) ukufika kwabo kwatjhugulula ipilo yamaKhoikhoi namaSan ebebavele bahlala lapha. Khumbuza abafundi bona uku'fumana' indawo akutjho bona beyingekho abantu - abantu bahlala lapha iminyaka eziinkulungwana.

slides.title: Kubayini abantu beYurophu bebafuna ukutjhayela baye eSewula?
slides.lead: Bebafuna indlela yelwandle eya erhwebweni elinothileko leMpumalanga.

blocks.text: Kade, iziinongo ezinjenge phepha nesinamoni, kunye nesilika negolide, bekufika eYurophu zisuka eIndiya neMpumalanga. Bezikhamba kancani ngehlangothi lomhlaba, ngalokho beziyabiza khulu **beziyabizeka**.

items: Amakhosi weYurophu bebafuna indlela erhanako netjhitjhipha yokufika eMpumalanga ngelwandle.
Abantu be**Portugal** bakhetha ukutjhayela baye eSewula batjhaya ilijobho le-Afrika bafumane indlela leyo.
Akakho eYurophu obekazi bona iimkhumbi ingakghona na ukujikeleza ingezansi le-Afrika.

media.alt: Amasaka amancani neenkohlwane zeziinongo neenhlweba eziseduze kwazo, kutjengiswa iimpahla zerhwebo eziqakathekileko.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q10 -46 30 -46 q20 0 30 46 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><path d='M96 120 q9 -40 26 -40 q17 0 26 40 Z' fill='#b5732f'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='76' rx='18' ry='6' fill='#5c3a17'/><ellipse cx='122' cy='82' rx='16' ry='6' fill='#7a4a1f'/><circle cx='168' cy='104' r='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='184' cy='112' r='12' fill='#d18f2c'/><circle cx='176' cy='94' r='10' fill='#f0b24a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza lokhu kubambeke: ibanga lamakhambo la ayingozi bekuyimali nerhwebo. Iziinongo bezisetjenziselwa ukunongelela nokulonda ukudla, begodu bezidula khulu. Hlathulula bona ngesikhathesi abantu beYurophu bekufanele bathenge iimpahla zeMpumalanga ngabarhwebi abanengi, okwenza zidule - indlela eqondileko yelwandle ibizakwenza bona iPortugal irhwebe yodwa. Ungabhodululi abafundi ngamabizo okwesikhathesi; abarhuli bafika ngemva kwalokhu.

slides.title: Abantu abavele bahlala lapha
slides.lead: ISewula Afrika beyilikhaya lamaKhoikhoi namaSan kade ngaphambi kobana kufike umkhumbi weYurophu.

blocks.text: AmaSan **AmaSan** bebazingeli-babuthi abazingela iinlwana babuthe iimilo. AmaKhoikhoi **AmaKhoikhoi** bebafuya iinkomo neenkomani bakhambe bafumane utjani obutjha namanzi. Ndawonye babizwa ngokuthi ma**Khoisan**.

items: Bebahlala eSewula Afrika iminyaka eziinkulungwana.
AmaKhoikhoi aseduze nelijobho ahlangana nabatjhayeli beYurophu bokuthoma ubuso nobuso.
Inarhali beyililikhaya labo - beyingasi kuthi ingekho namkha ilinde ukubana 'ifumaneke'.

media.alt: Iinkomo eembili ezidla utjani emhlabeni oluhlaza eduze kwendlu yotjani ephasi, kutjengiswa abafuyi bamaKhoikhoi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='108' width='240' height='52' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M30 108 q26 -30 52 0 Z' fill='#c8a25a'/><path d='M40 108 v-12 h4 v12 Z' fill='#8a6a34'/><g fill='#5c3a1f'><ellipse cx='150' cy='96' rx='22' ry='12'/><rect x='134' y='96' width='4' height='16'/><rect x='160' y='96' width='4' height='16'/><path d='M130 90 q-6 -6 -2 -10' stroke='#5c3a1f' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><ellipse cx='196' cy='104' rx='16' ry='9'/><rect x='185' y='104' width='3' height='12'/><rect x='203' y='104' width='3' height='12'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Isilaydi le iqakathekile eHistorini elungileko neqinisileko. Yenza kucace bona abantu bebahlala lapha isikhathi eside khulu banendlela yabo yokuphila. Hlukanisa kancani: amaSan bebazingeli-babuthi, amaKhoikhoi bebafuyi abanezinkomo neenkomani. Ibizo elithi 'ukufumana' namkha 'ukukatjelwa' lisetjenziswa ngokombono weYurophu; amaKhoisan bese avele azi inarhali le njengelikhaya. Lokhu kwakhela 'ukuhlangana kokuthoma' ngemva kwalokhu.

slides.title: IPortugal irhola indlela
slides.lead: Isinyathelo nesinyathelo, abatjhayeli bePortugal badweba ilijobho lentjhonalanga le-Afrika.

blocks.text: Abatjhayeli be**Portugal** abazange batjhayele indlela yoke ngesikhathi sinye. Ekhambweni ngalinye baya kancani ngesewula ilijobho le-Afrika baphindele ekhaya bazokwabelana ngalokho abakufundileko.

items: Bebatjhayela ngeemkhumbi yamapulanga eqinileko ebizwa ngokuthi ma**caravel** ekwakukghona ukutjhayela imelane nommoya.
Umkhaphetheni ngamunye bekungezelela ilijobho elitjha emabalazweni wePortugal.
Umgomo wabo bewusesekukufumana isiphetho se-Afrika batjhayele baye eMpumalanga.

media.alt: Umkhumbi we-caravel onemitjhini emithathu neenseyili ezimhlophe ezizeleko elwandle.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='220' height='42' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M46 118 L70 106 h84 l22 12 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'><line x1='78' y1='40' x2='78' y2='106'/><line x1='112' y1='30' x2='112' y2='106'/><line x1='146' y1='44' x2='146' y2='106'/></g><path d='M80 44 q26 6 0 40 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M114 34 q30 8 0 48 Z' fill='#dcd3c2'/><path d='M148 48 q22 6 0 36 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='110' y='30' width='16' height='10' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlathulula bona ukurhula bekuyindlela ekhambako kancani, ihloliweko, isinyathelo nesinyathelo iminyaka eminengi, ingasi ukukhamba kunye kwaphela. Yethula i-caravel: umkhumbi olula, orhanako obekungakghona ukutjhayela imelane nommoya, okwenza amakhambo amade welwandle akghonakala. Godu amabizo alula lapha - abakhapheteni ababili abaziwako (uDias noda Gama) baneenlaydi zabo ezizako.

slides.title: Ukufumana indlela elwandle
slides.lead: Ngaphandle kwamabalazwe welwandle elivulekileko, abatjhayeli basebenzisa ilanga, iinkwekwezi namathulusi alula.

blocks.text: Kude elwandle azikho iindlela namkha iimphawu zeendlela. Abarhuli bebasebenzisa i**khompasi** bafumane itlhagwini, godu bebaqala i**langa neenkwekwezi** bathole bona baphi.

items: Ithulusi elibizwa ngokuthi yi-**astrolabe** belisiza ukukala bona ilanga namkha inkwekwezi iphakeme kangangani esibhakabhakeni.
AmaPortugal bebahloma iimphambano zamatje ezikhulu, ezibizwa ngokuthi ma**padrao**, ilijobho ukuphawula bona bafike kuphi.
Amakhambo bekayingozi - iimuvunguvungu, indlala nesifo bekungahlasela kude nekhaya.

media.alt: Ikhompasi eyingubhe etjengisa itlhagwini, eduze kwesiphambano samatje eside esihlonywe elijobho.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='72' cy='80' r='40' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M72 46 L82 80 L72 114 L62 80 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M72 80 L82 80' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='2'/><text x='72' y='40' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' fill='#5c3f26'>N</text><rect x='150' y='40' width='10' height='84' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='134' y='58' width='42' height='10' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='128' y='120' width='54' height='14' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Le silaydi enokusebenza ngezandla, enomrhuko - abafundi beBanga 6 bakuthabela ukwazi 'njani'. Hlathulula lula bona inaliti yekhompasi ihlala ikhomba etlhagwini, nokobana ukuphakama kwelanga namkha iinkwekwezi kwakhombisa abatjhayeli bona bakude kangangani etlhagwini namkha esewula. Yethula 'padrao' (isiphambano samatje) ngombana uDias wahloma sinye begodu sivela esilaydini elandelako. Gandelela ingozi eqinisileko ukwakhela ihlonipho ngokobana amakhambo la bekabudisi kangangani.

slides.title: UBartolomeu Dias ujikeleza iCape
slides.lead: Ngo-1488 umkhapheteni wePortugal waba mumuntu wokuthoma weYurophu owaziwako ukutjhayela ajikeleza isiqongolo se-Afrika.

blocks.text: **UBartolomeu Dias** watjhayela aya eSewula kangangani bona isiwuruwuru saphephula iimkhumbi zakhe zajikeleza ingezansi le-Afrika angakaboni nelijobho. Bekajikeleze i**Cape**, aveza bona iimkhumbi ingafika eMpumalanga ngelwandle.

items: Wakhuphuka eMossel Bay wahloma isiphambano samatje elijobho.
Wathoma ngokubiza indawo leyo ngokuthi 'iCape yeeMuvunguvungu' ngenca yezulu elikghadlha.
IKosi yePortugal yayibiza kabutjha ngokuthi yi-**Cape of Good Hope** (iCape yeThemba Elihle), ngombana kwabe kunethemba lokufika eIndiya.

media.alt: Umkhumbi otjhukumiswa mmoya onamandla namagagasi ozunguleza ijime elinamatje, kunesiphambano samatje phezu kwelijime.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='50' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M0 110 q30 -14 60 0 t60 0 t60 0 t60 0 v50 H0 Z' fill='#2f5a78'/><path d='M150 110 q40 -30 90 -20 v20 Z' fill='#6b6152'/><rect x='196' y='58' width='7' height='34' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='186' y='68' width='27' height='7' fill='#b7a98d'/><path d='M48 108 L68 98 h44 l16 10 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><line x1='84' y1='60' x2='84' y2='98' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M86 62 q30 8 0 34 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 40 q30 8 60 2' stroke='#9aa77f' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lokhu ngelinye lamakhambo amabili aqakathekileko wesifundo. Gandelela u-1488 nombono 'wokuthoma' emtlolweni weYurophu. Landisa indaba lula: isiwuruwuru saphephula uDias wajikeleza iCape cabe kungaqaleki, okwaveza bona indlela yelwandle beyikghonakala. Ukutjhugululwa kwebizo kusuka ku'Cape yeeMuvunguvungu' kuya ku'Cape of Good Hope' kuyinto ekhumbulekako - buza abafundi bona kubayini 'ithemba elihle' beliyibizo elihle. [SME] Sicela uqinisekise amabizo bona uDias wakhuphuka eMossel Bay nokubizwa kweCape ngokuvumelana ne-athikili yeSAHO ngaphambi kokukhipha.

slides.title: UVasco da Gama ufika eIndiya
slides.lead: Ngemva kweminyaka elitjhumi, omunye umkhapheteni wePortugal watjhayela indlela yoke waya eIndiya wabuya.

blocks.text: **UVasco da Gama** wasuka ngo-1497. Iimkhumbi zakhe zajama ehlangothini lelijobho leSewula Afrika ngenca yamanzi ahlwengekileko nokuphumula, zabe zatjhayela ziya etlhagwini yelijobho lentjhingalanga zawela ziya e**Indiya**, afika khona ngo-1498.

items: Wabiza ilijobho lentjhingalanga ngokuthi yi-**Natal**, ngombana watjhayela adlula lapho eduze kweKresimusi.
Wavula indlela epheleleko yelwandle isuka eYurophu iya eMpumalanga.
Nje-ke iimkhumbi zePortugal bezidlula iCape kanengi ekhambweni lazo lokuyokurhweba.

media.alt: Ibalazwe elilula elitjengisa indlela yokutjhayela enamachaphaza isuka eYurophu iyela ephasi izungeleze i-Afrika iwele iye eIndiya.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M70 20 q-16 40 8 70 q18 22 0 46 q-6 12 14 12 q26 0 30 -22' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M150 24 q22 30 6 66 q-10 22 8 40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 26 C40 60 70 96 78 120 C82 138 120 138 150 120' fill='none' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><circle cx='60' cy='26' r='5' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='120' r='5' fill='#e8a13a'/><text x='60' y='16' font-size='10' fill='#f4efe6' text-anchor='middle'>Portugal</text><text x='176' y='118' font-size='10' fill='#f4efe6' text-anchor='middle'>India</text></svg>

slides.notes: Ikhambo lesibili eliqakathekileko. UDa Gama waqeda lokho okwathonywa nguDias: indlela evulekileko yelwandle iyokufika eIndiya. Kombisa ebalazweni bona indlela ilandela njani ilijobho le-Afrika ijikeleze iCape. Hlathulula bona 'Natal' ihlobene nokubelethwa/iKresimusi, kungakho ayisebenzisa eduze kwaka-25 kaZibandlela. Ngemva kwalokhu, iCape yaba yindawo yokujama yeemkhumbi ezidlulako - okurholela emaDatjhini. [SME] Qinisekisa ukubizwa kweNatal namalanga ka-1497-1498 ngokuvumelana neSAHO ngaphambi kokukhipha.

slides.title: Ukuhlangana eCape
slides.lead: Nekuhlangana abatjhayeli namaKhoikhoi, bekunerhwebo godu, kwesinye isikhathi, umtjhoferho.

blocks.text: Iimkhumbi ezidlulako beziyatlhoga amanzi ahlwengekileko, inyama nokuphumula. Abatjhayeli bebarhweba **berhweba** insimbi namapheshana namaKhoikhoi ngeenkomo neenkomani. Kodwana ihlangothi ezimbili bezingakhulumi ilimi elifanako, begodu ukungazwisisi bekungaphenduka ingozi.

items: Irhwebo lasiza abatjhayeli abadiniweko bafumana ukudla okuhlwengekileko ekhambweni elide.
Ngo-1510 kwaphuma umtjhoferho eTable Bay begodu umrholi wePortugal namadoda wakhe amanengi babulawa.
Iminyaka eminengi ngemva kwalokho, iimkhumbi ezinengi zePortugal zakhetha ukungajami eCape.

media.alt: Amaqembu amabili wabantu aqalene elwandle, elinye liseduze kwesikepe, atjhintjhelana iimpahla.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='100' width='240' height='18' fill='#3a6b8a'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='70' cy='70' r='10'/><rect x='63' y='82' width='14' height='30'/><circle cx='98' cy='72' r='10'/><rect x='91' y='84' width='14' height='28'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><circle cx='160' cy='70' r='10'/><rect x='153' y='82' width='14' height='30'/><circle cx='188' cy='72' r='10'/><rect x='181' y='84' width='14' height='28'/></g><rect x='118' y='86' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M206 100 q16 -6 30 0 v10 h-30 Z' fill='#5c3f26'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yiphathe ngobunono nangeqiniso ezingeni leBanga 6. Ukuhlangana bekunehlangothi ezimbili: irhwebo elinokuthula NOMTJHOFERHO. Umtjhoferho ka-1510 eTable Bay (lapho iViceroy yePortugal uFrancisco de Almeida namadoda amanengi bafa khona) yingcenye yokobana amaPortugal aphephe iCape ngemva kwalokho. Balekela ukusola ihlangothi linye; hlathulula bona ukungabikho kwelimi elifanako namasiko ahlukileko kwenza ithemba libe budisi. [SME] Sicela uqinisekise isehlakalo se-1510 seTable Bay, ubunikazi bomrholi, namezwi wabafako ngaphambi kokukhipha - kugcine kufanele ubudala.

slides.title: AmaDatjhi ne-VOC
slides.lead: Ngemva kweminyaka engaphezu kwekhulu, abarhwebi bakwaNetherlands bebatlhoga indawo yokujama esesephakathi endleleni eya eMpumalanga.

blocks.text: I**Dutch East India Company**, eyaziwa ngeenhlamvu zesiDatjhi ngokuthi yi-**VOC**, yathumela iimkhumbi ezinengi phakathi kweYurophu neMpumalanga. ICape beyihlezi hlangana kwekhambo elidesi.

items: Abatjhayeli emakhambweni amade bebavame ukugula ngaphandle kokudla okuhlwengekileko namanzi.
I-VOC beyifuna **isikhungo sokuhlumelela** eCape ukutjala iimbhida nokufumana inyama ehlwengekileko.
Ngalokho iKampani yakhetha ukuthumela abantu bazokwakha isisekelo eTable Bay.

media.alt: Iflege yomkhumbi werhwebo eseduze kweenkohlwane neenkohlwane, kutjengiswa isikhundla serhwebo sekampani.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='40' y='30' width='6' height='100' fill='#5c3f26'/><path d='M46 32 h60 v34 h-60 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><text x='76' y='55' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle' fill='#5c1414'>VOC</text><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='120' y='96' width='36' height='34'/><rect x='158' y='104' width='30' height='26'/></g><g stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='2'><line x1='120' y1='113' x2='156' y2='113'/><line x1='138' y1='96' x2='138' y2='130'/></g><ellipse cx='176' cy='104' rx='15' ry='6' fill='#8a6a34'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ibhulorho isuka emaPortugal iya emaDatjhini. Gandelela ibanga: i-VOC beyiyikampani yerhwebo ekulu okwathi iimkhumbi zayo zithathe iinyanga ukufika eMpumalanga, begodu abatjhayeli bebagula (kanengi ngesifo se-scurvy, ngokutlhayela ukudla okuhlwengekileko). Isikhungo sokuhlumelela esiphakathi eCape besizanikela iimbhida ehlwengekileko, amanzi nenyama. Lesi yibanga amaDatjhi afika ngalo - irhwebo nokunikela, ingasi ekuthomeni ukwakha inarha.

slides.title: UJan van Riebeeck eCape
slides.lead: Ngo-1652 i-VOC yathumela uJan van Riebeeck ukuyokwakha isikhungo sokuhlumelela.

blocks.text: **UJan van Riebeeck** wafika eTable Bay ngoMbimbi (April) 1652 nesiqhema esincani sabantu. Bakha inqaba yokuvikeleka batjala isimu esikhulu seembhida ukufunza iimkhumbi ezidlulako.

items: Batjala iimbhida neenthelo bafuya iinlwana ngenca yenyama ehlwengekileko.
Barhweba namaKhoikhoi ngeenkomo neenkomani.
Isikhungwesi esincani sakhula kancani - saba sithomo sokuhlala kwabantu beYurophu kokungapheliko.

media.alt: Inqaba enjengenkwekwezi eduze kwemirholo emihle yesimu yeembhida ngaphasi kwentaba enesiqongo esisicaba.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 60 h120 l16 -22 h44 v42 H20 Z' fill='#9aa77f'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='64' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g stroke='#3f6b45' stroke-width='3'><line x1='30' y1='108' x2='150' y2='108'/><line x1='30' y1='122' x2='150' y2='122'/><line x1='30' y1='136' x2='150' y2='136'/></g><path d='M176 104 l14 -8 l14 8 l-4 22 h-20 Z' fill='#c8b89a' stroke='#8a6a34' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='186' y='114' width='8' height='12' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lokhu kuphenduko yengcenye yesibili yesifundo. UVan Riebeeck wafika ngoMbimbi 1652 nabantu abangaba mamatjhumi malithoba; bakha inqaba neSimu yeKampani ukufunza iimkhumbi. Gandelela ibinzana elithi 'ukuhlala kokungapheliko' - ngokungafani namaPortugal ebekajama kwaphela, amaDatjhi ahlala. Ukuhlala lokho kwenza u-1652 aqakatheke kangaka begodu kurholela emiphumeleni evela esilaydini elandelako. [SME] Qinisekisa inyanga yokufika nobukhulu obubalelwako besiqhema saka-van Riebeeck (kanengi kubalwa njengabangaba ma-90) ngaphambi kokukhipha.

slides.title: Utjhuguluko ebantwini beCape
slides.lead: Ihlalo etjha yathatha kancani inarha nedlelo ebekweyame kikho amaKhoikhoi.

blocks.text: Ekuthomeni amaDatjhi namaKhoikhoi bebarhweba wodwana. Kodwana njengombana ihlalo yakhula, amaDatjhi afuna **inarha eyengeziweko** yamasimu - inarha efanako ebekwesetjenziswa mamaKhoikhoi ukudlisa iinkomo zawo.

items: AmaKhoikhoi alahlekelwa yidlelo begodu, ngokukhamba kwesikhathi, ilahlekelwa ziinkomo zawo ezinengi.
Ukungavumelani ngenarha neenkomo kwarholela emtjhoferhweni phakathi kwehlangothi ezimbili.
Ipilo yamaKhoikhoi namaSan yatjhugululwa unomphela yihlalo eseCape.

media.alt: Umugca wothango ohlukanisa idlelo eliluhlaza, kunezinkomo ngehlangothi linye nendlu yesimu ngelinye.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='64' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g stroke='#6b6152' stroke-width='3'><line x1='120' y1='60' x2='120' y2='150'/><line x1='104' y1='84' x2='136' y2='84'/><line x1='104' y1='104' x2='136' y2='104'/></g><g fill='#5c3a1f'><ellipse cx='56' cy='112' rx='18' ry='9'/><rect x='44' y='112' width='3' height='12'/><rect x='66' y='112' width='3' height='12'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='168' y='96' width='40' height='30'/></g><path d='M166 96 l22 -16 l22 16 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Letha umphumela omkhulu ngokucacileko nangokulinganako. Ubudlelwana bathoma ngerhwebo kodwana batjhuguluka njengombana abahlali bafuna inarha yamasimu - idlelo elifanako amaKhoikhoi ebekawatlhoga ngeenkomo zawo. Lokhu kwarholela ekulahlekelweni yinarha, ukulahlekelwa ziinkomo, nomtjhoferho. Kugcine kuliqiniso begodu kufanele ubudala; iphuzu kukobana ukufika kwehlalo kwatjhugulula ipilo yamaKhoikhoi namaSan unomphela. Lokhu kuhlobene neentloko ezizako zeCAPS ngokukoloniswa kweCape.

slides.title: Amalanga aqakathekileko: 1488 ukuya ku-1652

blocks.alt: Umugca wesikhathi ukusuka ku-1488 ukuya ku-1652 otjengisa uDias ajikeleza iCape, uda Gama afika eIndiya, umtjhoferho we-1510 eTable Bay, noku-van Riebeeck afika ngo-1652.

events.label: UVasco da Gama utjhayela aye eIndiya
Iimkhumbi zamaDatjhi ze-VOC zidlula iCape kanengi

slides.notes: Sebenzisa isilaydi le ukusiza abafundi balandelanise izehlakalo, ikghono eliqakathekileko leCAPS Isigaba Esiphakathi. Bacele bathi baqaphele ikghelo elide phakathi kwamakhambo wokuthoma wePortugal (ekupheleni kweminyaka yabo-1400) nehlalo yamaDatjhi (1652) - iminyaka engaphezu kwe-150. AmaPortugal afumana asebenzisa indlela yelwandle; amaDatjhi ngiwo agcina ahlala eCape.

slides.title: Amahlangothi amabili wendaba efanako
slides.lead: Amakhambo afanako aqaleka ngokuhlukileko kuye ngokobana ungubani.

items: Kwavuleka indlela yelwandle eya ebunothini beMpumalanga.
Irhwebo neemkhumbi zakhula, iCape yaba yindawo yokujama eqakathekileko.
AmaDatjhi akha isisekelo esihlalako esiqongolweni se-Afrika.
Iimfiki zafika enarheni ebeyivele iyilikhaya lawo.
Alahlekelwa yidlelo neenkomo njengombana ihlalo yakhula.
Indlela yawo yokuphila yatjhugululwa unomphela.

slides.notes: Lesi yisilaydi yokucabanga. Fundisa 'umbono' - iHistori efanako izwakala njengempumelelo ekarisako ngehlangothi leYurophu neyokulahlekelwa ngehlangothi lamaKhoisan. Khuthaza abafundi bona babambelele emaqinisweni womabili ngasikhathi sinye. Lokhu kubumba ukucabanga kweHistori okulinganako begodu kubalungiselela imibuzo yokubukeza.

slides.title: Esikufundileko
slides.lead: Abatjhayeli bePortugal bafumana indlela yelwandle ejikeleza iSewula Afrika, begodu amaDatjhi ngemva kwalokho ahlala eCape - atjhugulula ipilo yamaKhoisan.

blocks.text: Khumbula indaba: abantu beYurophu bebafuna indlela yelwandle eya eMpumalanga; **uDias** wajikeleza iCape ngo-1488 begodu **uda Gama** wafika eIndiya ngo-1498; kwathi ngo-**1652 uvan Riebeeck** wakha isikhungo sokuhlumelela esakhula saba yihlalo ehlalako.

blocks.question: Kubayini amaPortugal afuna ukutjhayela ajikeleze isiqongolo se-Afrika?
Qamba abarhuli ababili abaziwako bePortugal kwesifundwesi begodu utjho bona ngamunye wenzeni.
Ukufika kwehlalo yamaDatjhi eCape kwatjhugulula njani ipilo yamaKhoikhoi?

slides.notes: Phetha ngokubukeza izehlakalo ezintathu eziqakathekileko: uDias (1488), uda Gama (1497-98) noku-van Riebeeck (1652). Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi otloliweko namkha ingcoco yekilasi; amamaki alandela isitayila seCAPS. Umbuzo wokugcina uhlola bona abafundi bangakghona ukuhlathulula umphumela, ingasi ukukhumbula iqiniso kwaphela. Bonisa isahluko esilandelako: ukukoloniswa kweCape ngeminyaka yeenkhulungwana ye-17 ne-18.
